title: Realistic Cakes
description: Makes the cake item edible, with durability for each slice stage.
body:
This data pack makes it so the cake item is actually edible, and when you place it on the ground, it has as many slices as you ate! Only necessary on the server! It also makes uneaten cakes stackable to 64, as they should be!

It modifies the cake crafting recipe, a loot table in Trial Chambers that generates cakes, and the Farmer trade for cakes. Any cakes that exist in the world before this data pack is added will not have this feature.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6Pn75d17rCo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[This pack is inspired by commands created by members of the Minecraft Commands Discord server.](https://discord.com/channels/154777837382008833/593812273164976166/1238534766266159104)
![An image containing the command from the Minecraft Commands server that served as inspiration for this pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69fe7f674248ec064f79f4283da8e9024e48337.png)
